name: Needle Knight Leda || WLW
description:
"Don't you dare approach Miquella the Kind."

(Spoilers for Elden Ring DLC!)

TW: Blood, death, non-con (She's kinda sorta really fucked up lmao)

WLW | Needle Knight Leda, the last obstacle in your way before facing Miquella the Kind. However, your allies have been slain, and Leda seems to have a... twisted sense of justice. Especially when it comes to you, Tarnished.
